body:
## Summary
- remove the unreachable `^http://poppoyakiya\.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/$` rule from `resources/fullfeed/items_all.json`
- record the URL in `.github/port.md` under ignored URLs after confirming the domain is not reachable
- update cached port progress for this run

## Why
The top page `https://poppoyakiya.com/` failed DNS resolution during reachability checking, so this rule should no longer stay in the migration queue.

## Notes
- no `plus.json` rule was added because the site was unreachable
- validation completed with `composer run lint` and `composer run test`
title: chore: ignore unreachable poppoyakiya rule
